title: Extract JWKS client + JWT validator to common crate (R-23)
body:
## Summary
- Extract `JwksClient`, `JwtValidator`, `verify_token<T>`, `Jwk`, `JwksResponse` from `gc-service/src/auth/` to `crates/common/src/jwt.rs`
- Rename `JwtValidationError` to `JwtError` with 3 new variants (`InvalidSignature`, `KeyNotFound`, `ServiceUnavailable`)
- Add `HasIat` trait for compile-time iat field enforcement
- GC auth module becomes thin wrappers with `From<JwtError> for GcError` error mapping
- 32+ new tests: wiremock JWKS cache tests, verify_token edge cases, Ed25519 round-trip tests
- `JwksClient::new()` now returns `Result` (ADR-0002 no-panic compliance)

## Review
- Security: RESOLVED (2 findings fixed: iat enforcement upgraded, clock_skew clamped)
- Test: RESOLVED (1 finding fixed: complete From variant coverage)
- Observability: CLEAR (tracing targets updated to common.jwt.*)
- Code Quality: RESOLVED (6 findings fixed: HasIat trait, #[expect] annotations, dead_code cleanup)
- DRY: RESOLVED (1 accepted deferral: Claims/ServiceClaims consolidation)
- Operations: CLEAR (clean dependency changes, no deployment impact)

## Test plan
- [x] `cargo check --workspace` passes
- [x] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [x] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` passes
- [x] `cargo test --workspace` passes (common: 143, gc-service: 274)
- [x] Guards: 14/14 pass
- [x] Semantic guard: PASS
- [ ] Verify GC integration tests still pass in CI
- [ ] Verify MC can import `common::jwt::JwtValidator` for task 9
